nl_query: Which faculty members have prepared answer keys for papers where they are also assigned as the board coordinator, creating a potential conflict of interest?
failed_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT fc.name AS preparer_name, bc.faculty_cache_id AS coordinator_id
FROM   faculty_cache fc
JOIN   board_coordinator bc ON bc.faculty_cache_id = fc.id
JOIN   answer_key_preparer akp ON akp.faculty_cache_id = fc.id
JOIN   answer_key ak ON ak.id = akp.answer_key_id
JOIN   board b ON b.qp_id = ak.qp_id
WHERE  bc.board_id = b.id
  AND  akp.employee_id = bc.faculty_cache_id
  AND  fc.is_active = TRUE
  AND  bc.is_active = TRUE
ORDER BY fc.name, bc.faculty_cache_id;
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): board_coordinator.is_active, answer_key_preparer.employee_id. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
